query: Rewisp: See it once. Ask forever. complaints OR frustrating OR broken

results.title: Hello Wisp highly suspicious healthcare website
results.content:
- The only that sucks about wisp is how slow they they are at refilling your prescription. I get mine called into my pharmacy so I don't actually use their birth control I just get a script thru them. One time it took 8 days to refill and I had missed days of birth control. Seems that's happening right now to me again. It's been 2 days and I still don't have my script filled
- Wisp is a total scam
- This entire thread is a bunch of fear mongering fools who don’t want women to have access to reproductive Telehealth services. Not a single bad review ever came back and said they got a resolution. Of any sort. All of the positive reviews sound like real people. This thread was fcking tedious. [...] ## Top Comments
- They wouldn't let me cancel my subscription without uploading an ID photo. Perfectly happy to charge me though. Had to do a charge back with the bank and get a new card number to end it. Stay away from these scammers.
- I used to have no issues with Wisp but now there have constantly been delays and my cycle has been really messed up because of it.
- I had a computer error with them where they assigned my spouses information to a test kit and threw it away. They expected me to create another account, pay another $150 without refunding or crediting the initial $150 spent on the test they threw away... my experience was super shady.
- Used it for several thing and have never had an issue. Even cancelling my subscription [...] - Stay away from WISP at all cost, total rip off. I used them and they will rip you off in a second. I set up an account and got some drugs through them. I made the assumption I would be getting a full 3 month prescription 1 a day of the drugs I wanted. Subscription, they call it stated 3 month supply, I assumed it was for a daily dosage, my bad for making an assumption. These con artist sent me 5 pills for a 3 month period. These pills are to be taken for fever blister onset for 5 days. Say I have another outbreak checked and it would be 65 dollars for 5 more pills in that 3 month period. Checked with TelyRx and 90 of the same pills are 69 dollars. I didn't do a good search to find TeleRx at first, thought I did as only Wisp showed up when searching for the drug until I changed the way I

results.title: Frustration: Still a Common User Experience
results.content: description of frustration there's a lot of interesting uh stories and a lot of interesting insights about how systems cause frustration we classified those in in three groups the individual stories I will have to refer it to the the paper to read so poor performance is the most common cause of frustration about half of the incidents concern slow application freezing systems systems that crash H which is very similar to earlier studies second is a group of about 16% of frustrating incidents which can be said to be due to poor utility in these incidents frustration results from a mismas between what the system can do and what the need user need so absent functionality unsatisfactory content are typical examples and third poor usability is a cause of one in three incidents and these [...] work we also didn't require participant to L A particular number of frustrations and still we did a number of very careful checks of data quality which removed 42 participants bring the the number to the 234 that I mentioned before I'll just give you a few highlights of the results you can find many more details and other results in the paper so the time lost to frustrating incidents vared between 1 second to 1 hour this time include the time span trying to solve the the problem and the time spent recovering from any lost work across the 1hour reporting period the participants lost an average of 6 to 12 minutes due to frustration corresponding to 11 to 20% of the reporting period some participants reported losing more than an hour this was either wrong or they included time lost beyond [...] this was either wrong or they included time lost beyond the reporting period so this is why on this slide we give an upper and a lower Bound for the time loss where we have adjusted the times higher than an hour down the time lost to frustration has dropped from about 50% in the study for power while this drop is gratifying the time loss is still high imagine the consequences if our results generalize for each 5day week of computer work between half a day and a full day will be spent in frustrating episodes trying to recover from losing work the frustrating incidents happened during task with a median importance of seven on a one to n rating scale this also uh caus quite High frustration so participant self-rated frustration was also seven on a 1 to n scale where nine is the highest and

results.title: Keeps | BBB Complaints | Better Business Bureau
results.content:
Resolved:The complainant verified the issue was resolved to their satisfaction. Unresolved:The business responded to the dispute but failed to make a good faith effort to resolve it. Answered:The business addressed the issues within the complaint, but the consumer either a) did not accept the response, OR b) did not notify BBB as to their satisfaction. Unanswered:The business failed to respond to the dispute. Unpursuable:BBB is unable to locate the business.    I initially purchased a Black Friday promo offer, to use one-time only, a $180 subscription for hair care gel. I did not like the gel, and asked to exchange it. They said no to an exchange, regardless whether it was opened or not. So I went on with my life thinking I've already spent the money that's not coming back, I won't renew [...] Date:05/14/2026

Our team sympathizes with the frustrations surrounding your refund request. Our team is not able to provide you with the requested refund amount due to our billing policy. Once a product has shipped we are unable to refund the charge associated with that order.   
   ### Initial Complaint

Date:04/07/2026

Type:Service or Repair Issues Status:Answered More info## Complaint statuses [...] spent the money that's not coming back, I won't renew my order or further purchase it, as it messes up my hair and its not even that effective. 3 months later, I get a credit card notification in the middle of the night that I was charged a renewal of $189, I did not consent, and I went to go ahead and cancel a few hours after I saw the credit card charge alert. The customer service said I can no longer cancel, as they have already charged my credit card. They cannot cancel shipping, I am, again, out of my hard-earned money. Convenient for them, they do not give refunds for processed orders due to their policy. I explained my situation, everything, but they did not budge. I paid for the protection plan stating that I will receive my funds back if anything happen that I didnt get my purchase on the app is still states that my item will be delivered to me however, I already know now that Ive been robbed of my money the company is fraudulent fraudulent fraudulent. I reported it to the BBB and I will continue to do so because theyre gonna give me my money back.

Samantha A Fyh [...] ## Uber - Urgent human help, please call immediately

I'm just trying to contact Uber, having trouble!!! My son needs to contact his driver and doesn't have the number for his driver.

A friend had called for his ride, and he can't get a hold of him to get the #. Please call me!! He was taken to 7252 County Road 1208, Nevada, Texas 75173. He forgot his sunglasses in the car and needs them back, please.

I'm not 'pissed,' just frustrated, having trouble trying to contact Uber... not easy? Please help me!!

Call me at 469-684-\\\\. Thank you most sincerely, Shawn White, (mother of Chance Armour) was picked up in Wylie from Discount Tire 3401 FM 544 Wylie Texas, driven to 7252 County Road 1208 Nevada Texas 75173.

Cons:

 Hard to contact customer support [...] I would never recommend this products and I will donate the unused to goodwill. I surprisingly got an email saying my next shipment was on its way and they charged my card. I didn't have an account set up so once I signed up and found my email address there was no way to cancel the subscription that I never signed up for. I had to use the chat ai to ask for cancellation and they said they would cancel it.

I will keep a close eye on this. I am not happy that more of this sick scent is coming my way. I think this is a terrible scam. Any one involved with this company is doing it wrong and ruining their business reputation.

Get it right , don't do business like a cheat .

Be honest from now on! Let it be so...
